philosophy: Tripwires, not verdicts. The gate flags; the agent reasons and returns a verdict.

tripwires.fires_on: Any spend / financial commitment present in a deliverable
tripwires.requires: A valid reasoned verdict block: VERDICT: refuse|conditional|escalate + FLIPS IF:

tripwires.fires_on: A financial claim ($ figure, %, MRR/ARR/burn/runway/CAC/LTV/NRR/churn/margin) on a line with no source tag
tripwires.requires: A source tag on the line: (source, date) or 'as of …' or 'per …'

tripwires.fires_on: Mentions M&A / equity dilution / cap table / stock option grant / tax strategy
tripwires.requires: VERDICT: escalate (no reasoning override — licensed-professional territory)

verdict_format.FLIPS_IF: the specific evidence or condition that would change this verdict

notes: Heuristic detection. False positives are acceptable: the fix is to add the verdict/source, which the loop should produce anyway. Never asks the model to 'show its thinking' (REFUSALS.md reasoning_extraction).
